name: Holiday Shrimp Newburg
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan or Dutch oven. Add onions, celery, and garlic. Cook until tender.
2. Sprinkle with flour and cook gently for 3-4 minutes.
3. Whisk in wine or chicken stock, sherry, turmeric, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and cream. Heat thoroughly, then simmer for an additional 5 minutes. Add peas and simmer for 3-5 more minutes. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
5. Serve over rice or noodles.
